ogTitle: Beaufort vs Beazleys Bridge: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Beaufort and Beazleys Bridge.
heading: Beaufort vs Beazleys Bridge — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Beaufort, Victoria and Beazleys Bridge, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Beaufort has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Beazleys Bridge (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Beaufort or Beazleys Bridge safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Beaufort has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Beazleys Bridge scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Beaufort scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Beazleys Bridge scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Beaufort or Beazleys Bridge?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Beaufort has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
